name: Codota
description: Codota — AI code completion for Java and Kotlin with IDE plugins trained on billions of code lines.

seo.title: Codota — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Codota: Codota — AI code completion for Java and Kotlin with IDE plugins trained on billions of code lines.

when_to_use: Getting Java code completions trained on millions of repositories
Searching for code patterns across team codebases semantically
Reducing boilerplate with AI-assisted Java and Kotlin completions
Running smart completions in IntelliJ or Android Studio

pros: Deep Java and Kotlin completion strength
Trained on large JVM code corpora for idiomatic suggestions
Now part of Tabnine with expanded feature set
cons: Product effectively merged into Tabnine, brand is legacy
Narrow JVM focus limits polyglot teams
Feels dated compared to LLM-native assistants
Documentation points in confusing directions post-merger
review.verdict: Historically great for JVM devs, but Codota the product is gone, look at Tabnine instead.
review.best_for: Legacy reference only, Java and Kotlin teams evaluating Tabnine
review.not_for: Anyone starting fresh today, use Tabnine or Copilot directly
